notes.en: Commercial F1 hybrid in DOA's HORDI brinjal recommendation list. 50% flowering at 34 days after planting; yield 45–50 t/ha; ~4,960 g per plant.

expected_yield_kg_per_acre.quote: One variety shows a yield of 45-50 t/ha with a yield per plant of 4960g and 50% flowering at 34 days, while another variety shows 55-60 t/ha with 5600g per plant and 50% flowering at 35 days
expected_yield_kg_per_acre.review_notes: 45–60 t/ha across two hybrids → 18211–24281 kg/acre. Attribution to Amanda F1 / Anjalee F1 inferred; agronomist confirmation recommended.
